title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access the dashboard.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance in the account.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is visible but not working.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city, but it still displays the old one after saving new information.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13 devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet in their bank account.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving the 2FA verification code on their registered phone number during login.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but gets an upload failed error every time.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Problem
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle is disabled in settings.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but did not receive a confirmation email even though payment succeeded.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Customer says the password reset link expires immediately after clicking, even within one minute of receiving it.

title: Chat Support Not Loading
description: Live chat support widget keeps showing a loading spinner and never connects to an agent.

title: Coupon Code Not Applying
description: Customer enters a valid discount coupon during checkout, but the total amount does not change.
